title: centaurea × bouchoni
intro: Centaurea × bouchoni, also known as Mountain Cornflower, is a hybrid plant species in the aster family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have a positive effect on digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Centaurea × bouchoni are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
